scope: 38 card MDs + 38 matching reports/vision_pending JSON sidecars + 2 source files

diagnosis.whats_wrong: 38 card MDs and 38 matching vision-pending JSON sidecars carry suspected_ip values in the form 'Amoonguss (#591)' -- species name plus National Pokedex number as a parenthetical hash-suffix. Correct schema form is the bare species name only ('Amoonguss'). Obsidian reads '#591' inside a YAML text scalar as a tag fragment, spawning phantom numeric tag-nodes (#591, #050, #701 ...) in the graph, one per affected card.
diagnosis.why_it_happened: The bbl-researcher agent spec IP-guardrails block instructs the vision model to populate suspected_ip with the character name but does not prohibit parenthetical qualifiers. For Pokemon cards the model appended the Pokedex number as a disambiguating suffix. apply_vision.py and bbl_schema.normalize_file() have no sanitization for suspected_ip; the value is written verbatim.
diagnosis.whats_at_risk: (1) Obsidian graph view gets 38 phantom numeric tag-node edges. (2) The 38 vision_pending JSONs are the active transmission vector -- apply_vision.py run on any of them before patching re-infects the card MD. (3) Buyer-facing body prose renders ugly: '**Suspected IP:** Amoonguss (#591) (confidence: high, verified: False)'.

prescription.step_1: Patch 38 card MDs: strip ' (#NNN)' hash-parenthetical from suspected_ip via re.sub(r'\s*\(#\d+\)\s*$', '', val). suspected_ip: "Amoonguss (#591)" -> suspected_ip: Amoonguss
prescription.step_2: Patch 38 vision-pending JSONs: same strip on the suspected_ip key. Prevents re-infection on next apply_vision.py run.
prescription.step_3: Edit .claude/agents/bbl-researcher.md IP-guardrails block: add constraint forbidding Pokedex numbers / set codes / parenthetical qualifiers in suspected_ip -- bare character/species name only.
prescription.step_4: Edit apply_vision.py: add defensive sanitizer re.sub(r'\s*\(#\d+\)\s*$', '', vision['suspected_ip']).strip() before update_card(), so future agent drift cannot re-introduce the issue.

bonus_findings: Two other triage entries are already self-healed and warrant bookkeeping-close, no treatment: (a) bbl_node_audit.py wikilink-differentiation warn item -- check_wikilinks() already emits card_cross_reference / cross_wiki_reference and never emits dangling_wikilink; (b) [[Labor]]/[[Rebellion]] casing item -- chinese-zodiac.md already uses lowercase.
sidecar_written_by: parent (Janny has no Write tool; prescription delivered inline, parent transcribed)
